summary: Fix namespace drift in 6 package.json name fields: opencode-context-governor, opencode-crash-guard, opencode-eval-harness, opencode-fallback-doctor, opencode-plugin-healthd, opencode-plugin-preload-skills. Renamed from @jackoatmon/* and @opencode/* scoped names to flat opencode-* names matching directory layout.
root_cause: Package name fields were set using old @jackoatmon/* and @opencode/* scoped namespaces. Directory names and workspace resolver use flat opencode-* names causing a mismatch.
fix_approach: Renamed name field in each package.json from scoped to flat opencode-* format. No source code changes — purely metadata correction.

validation.notes: Verified bun test passes for opencode-logger (representative). No cross-deps broken in this batch — those are in part2.
